summary: First test run for VibeDeck. Backend: 11/12 pytest tests passed (health, models, auth gating with X-Test-User, /api/me, validation, scratch generation w/ deepseek-v4-pro, polling-till-ready, list, ownership scoping, delete). One backend failure: GET /api/presentations with NO Authorization header returns 500 instead of 401 due to a JSON-serialization crash in auth.py — Clerk returns AuthErrorReason enum which FastAPI cannot serialize into the HTTPException(detail=...). Frontend: full E2E flow PASSED — demo auth -> dashboard -> 5 LLM options visible -> scratch modal -> DeepSeek selected -> confirm -> generation overlay -> auto-nav to /p/{id} -> slide-canvas + controls -> next-slide advances 1/9 -> 2/9 -> thumbnail-strip visible -> back to dashboard shows new deck in decks-grid.

critical.issue: Returns 500 instead of 401. Root cause: backend/auth.py L54 raises HTTPException(status_code=401, detail=state.reason). state.reason is an AuthErrorReason enum from clerk_backend_api, which FastAPI's JSONResponse cannot serialize -> TypeError: 'Object of type AuthErrorReason is not JSON serializable'. Fix: cast detail to str(...) (or use .name / .value).

action_items: Fix auth.py: in get_current_user, when state.is_signed_in is False, coerce reason to a string. Example: detail = str(getattr(state, 'reason', '') or 'Unauthorized'). Likewise wrap the except clause's detail in str(). This will turn the 500 into a proper 401.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py L54: HTTPException detail must be JSON-serialisable; AuthErrorReason enum currently crashes FastAPI's error handler -> 500.
server.py L314 @app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in FastAPI 0.100+; migrate to lifespan handler.
server.py — generate_from_pdf does not enforce a max file size; large PDFs could OOM the worker. Add size guard before extract_pdf_text.
pipeline.run_generation swallows all exceptions and stores error[:500]; consider logging traceback server-side for debuggability.

Dashboard.js modal exit animation can detach confirm-scratch-button while Playwright auto-retries, causing intermittent click-detach issues — consider disabling exit animation on submit or programmatically blocking re-click.
test_credentials: Backend: header X-Test-User: <any-id>. Frontend: demo auth at /sign-in (any email). Used alex@novagrid.com and alex2@novagrid.com.
seed_data_creation: Test created a real DeepSeek-V4-Pro generated deck (~9 slides) via /api/presentations/scratch for user 'alex2@novagrid.com'. Earlier pytest deck was deleted in test_05_delete. The frontend-test deck remains in DB for user alex2@novagrid.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` after main agent fixes auth.py. Only TestAuth.test_no_auth_returns_401 is currently failing. Generation tests use deepseek-v4-pro and complete in ~60-120s. Use X-Test-User header for backend auth. Frontend uses demo auth (no real Clerk in preview).

rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: curl https://<host>/api/presentations  (no Authorization header, no X-Test-User)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In /app/backend/auth.py line 54: raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail=getattr(state, 'reason', 'Unauthorized') or 'Unauthorized'). When Clerk authenticate_request runs without a session cookie/JWT, state.is_signed_in=False and state.reason is an AuthErrorReason enum (not a string). FastAPI then tries json.dumps(detail) and raises TypeError: 'Object of type AuthErrorReason is not JSON serializable' -> 500.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Coerce to string: detail=str(getattr(state, 'reason', '') or 'Unauthorized'). Also do the same in the except branch (line 51) to be safe: detail=f'Token verification failed: {exc!s}' (already a str, OK).
